title: Internship - Market & Technology Intelligence (f/m/d)
description:
We are CARIAD, the automotive software company of the Volkswagen Group. Our teams build automotive software platforms and digital customer functions for iconic brands like Audi, Volkswagen, and Porsche – supporting the Volkswagen Group in becoming the leading automotive technology company. With CARIDIANS in Germany, the USA, China, Estonia, and India, we are transforming automotive mobility for everyone.

Join us and be part of this exciting journey!

YOUR TEAM

To support our Market Intelligence team as part of the Product Strategy department we are currently looking for an intern in the area of market and technology intelligence. In your role you get first-hand experience in continuously identifying and evaluating market and technology developments and their impact on the CARIAD technology stack as well as the overall product and technology strategy and will be an integral part of the team. These insights are then applied among others to define the strategy and portfolio, which is being managed by the overall product strategy department. We are a team of curious people with a strong analytical and future mindset – embedded into a worldwide network of the VW Group.

What You Will Do


Identify and analyze key and emerging technologies, market developments and upcoming features within the competition or across other industries with the help of our tools, digital platform and input from experts and partners
Research and evaluate key market and technologic developments, scout leading industry events and prepare management briefings to support strategic decision making
Strengthen and enhance our market and technology intelligence and its corresponding processes
Explore, test and implement the possibilities of artificial intelligence to improve our intelligence activities
Derive potential implications by screening and scouting in the tech industry and market activities for the strategy, innovation and the technology stack of CARIAD
Continuously manage and improve our digital intelligence, product and technology strategy platform
Collaborate with other departments on intelligence projects by presenting the results into the organization


Who You Are


Enrolled student in a technical or business degree (ideally master's program) with a focus on Technology Management, Digitalization, Business Informatics, Engineering, Computer Science, Innovation or similar field
Familiarity with market intelligence, strategy development, technology scouting, competitor analysis or similar fields
First experiences in utilization or adoption of AI tools and platforms would be preferred
Internship or working student experience in the tech, software, consulting or automotive industry would be an advantage
Strong communication skills in English and German
Well-structured, independent work
Proactive mindset, curiosity for technology and innovative topics


NICE TO KNOW


Remote work options within Germany
Duration: 5 - 6 months 
35 h/week
Salary: 13,90 €/hour 


At CARIAD, we embrace individuality and diversity because we believe our differences make us stronger. We actively seek to build teams with a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences. Our goal is to create an environment where everyone feels valued and empowered to contribute. If you need assistance with your application due to a disability, please reach out to us at careers@cariad.technology - we are happy to support you.
